app_archetype: Electric & Neon (Future, Speed, Disruption) adapted for Emotional Connection

layouts.app_container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto h-[100dvh] overflow-hidden relative shadow-2xl ring-1 ring-white/10 bg-zinc-950 flex flex-col
layouts.swipe_deck: relative w-full h-[65vh] flex items-center justify-center mt-4

motion.swipe_cards: Use Framer Motion drag='x', dragConstraints={{ left: 0, right: 0 }} for swipeable cards. Add rotation on drag.
motion.page_transitions: Slide up/down transitions for the match modal using Framer Motion AnimatePresence.

BottomNav.styles: fixed bottom-0 w-full max-w-md h-20 flex items-center justify-around backdrop-blur-2xl bg-zinc-950/85 border-t border-white/10 z-50
BottomNav.behavior: Active state should have the icon colored rose-500 with a subtle glowing dot below it.

FeedPost.elements: Left: Avatar. Right: Username, handle, timestamp, text (Outfit font for thoughts to give them weight), action bar (Vibe/Heart, Comment, Share).

SwipeCard.styles: absolute w-[90%] h-full rounded-3xl overflow-hidden bg-zinc-900 border border-white/10 shadow-2xl
SwipeCard.elements: Top 60%: Huge typography showing the user's best 'Thought/Post' (e.g. 'Unpopular opinion: ...'). Bottom 40%: Images in a horizontal scrolling bento, Name, Age, Distance. Gradient overlay to ensure text readability.

MatchModal.styles: fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-zinc-950/95 backdrop-blur-md flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center p-6
MatchModal.elements: Pulsing glowing gradient orb behind two overlapping avatars. 'Vibe Matched' huge text.

ProfileBento.elements: Span-2 cell for Bio/Stats, Span-1 for photos, Span-1 for Music/Spotify tags, Span-2 for Top Tweets/Thoughts.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure primary text has minimum 4.5:1 against zinc-900. Use text-shadow on text overlapping images.
accessibility.touch_targets: Minimum 48x48px for all actionable icons in BottomNav and Feed.

user_avatar_1.description: Expressive young woman smiling (Use for main demo profile or swipe card)

user_avatar_2.description: Edgy girl with glasses (Use for feed posts)

user_avatar_3.description: Stylish guy outdoor (Use for matches or feed)

feed_media_1.description: Neon concert crowd (Use as attached media in a feed post)

instructions_to_main_agent:
CRITICAL: Wrap the entire application routing/layout in `
...
`. This forces the desktop view to look exactly like a mobile app screen.
Use Lucide-React for all icons (Home, Sparkles/Flame for match, MessageCircle, User).
Implement Framer Motion for the Swipe functionality. Make the SwipeCard draggable strictly on the X-axis. On drag end > threshold, animate out to the side.
The Feed should look similar to Twitter but with a darker, more neon 'nightlife' club aesthetic. Buttons should have subtle hover glows.
Match screen should be bold. Use the rose-500 gradient aggressively here.

Do not use generic Shadcn cards without stripping the border and adding custom rounded-3xl and bg-zinc-900. Stick to pure Tailwind HTML for structural layouts when possible to ensure the mobile proportions aren't ruined by desktop-focused library defaults.

universal_guidelines_for_main_agent.anti_slop: Do not make generic centered layouts. Ensure depth with layered z-indexes. Use glass-morphism (backdrop-blur-xl).
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent.animations: Every interaction needs micro-animations. No 'transition-all', only specific transitions (transform, opacity).
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent.spacing: Use generous padding inside cards, but keep the overall container dense enough for mobile.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute for automated testing.
